decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_utica-avenue-improvements-2011' already exists in the registry with matching source '2011_09_15_sbs_utica_cb8_9_17', matching project_name 'Utica Avenue Improvements', matching project_type 'bus lane and loading improvements', matching status 'proposed', and matching borough 'Brooklyn'. The observation resolves to its own existing registry record; no DIFFERENT registry record represents the same real-world thing. The similar record 'project_utica-ave-bus-priority-safety-study' has a distinct name ('Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study'), distinct project_type ('study'), distinct status ('ongoing'), and distinct source_ids (2012-2013), indicating it is a broader follow-on effort, not the same project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Proposed loading and bus lane improvement

proposed_relations.description: The 2011 Utica Avenue Improvements proposal was superseded by and incorporated into the broader Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study (2012-2013). The study description explicitly includes 'proposed loading and bus lane improvements and a corridor study from Carroll St. to Church Ave.', mirroring the 2011 proposal scope.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Proposed loading and bus lane improvement
Signal timing improvements for all traffic • Transit Signal Priority (TSP) for buses • Left turn bays to reduce blockages by turning vehicles • Pedestrian safety improvements
